final_prompt.prompt:
Create a universal social media avatar for an auto-digital-lifestyle content creator, designed to travel across Chinese and international platforms with quiet confidence.

Style/medium: a refined, minimal brand mark that speaks the visual language of contemporary tech culture — clean geometry with a human pulse, neither aggressively masculine nor stereotypically feminine, avoiding any cultural symbols that carry regional baggage
Composition: centered, balanced weight, generous breathing room around the mark, scalable from 48px to full profile banner
Subject: an abstract fusion suggesting motion and connection — perhaps a simplified road curve meeting a circuit trace, or a warm geometric shape that hints at both car silhouette and digital interface
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: neutral clarity with gentle warmth, the calm confidence of someone who tests products rather than sells them
Color palette: a restrained duo or trio — deep trustworthy blue, warm graphite, and a single accent of living green or amber, avoiding red-heavy combinations that carry political or warning connotations in either hemisphere
Materials/textures: flat vector precision with subtle depth, no photorealistic gradients or 3D gloss that feels dated
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: no human figures or faces (avoiding age/race/gender triggers), no national flags or religious symbols, no animal totems that carry zodiac or cultural taboos, no lightning bolts or aggressive angles that read as hostile, must remain legible at 1:1 thumbnail scale
Avoid: overly masculine automotive cliché (flames, chrome, aggressive animals), overly feminine lifestyle cliché (pastel florals, script fonts), region-specific lucky symbols that confuse abroad, complex detail that collapses at small sizes, any color combination associated with political movements or warning signage
